title: Agasthiyar Falls
tagline: Agasthiyar Falls — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Agasthiyar Falls (also called Papanasam Falls) is located close to Papanasam in Tirunelveli district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Agasthiyar Falls (also called Papanasam Falls) is located close to Papanasam in Tirunelveli district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The falls is located on the Western Ghats and to the south of Papanasam lower, the lake from where Tamiraparani River originates. It is located 42 km (26 mi) from the nearest city Tirunelveli. As per Hindu legend, it is the place where sage Agasthya got a view of Shiva in his marriage costume.

topPlaces.name: A & F Harvey Brothers
topPlaces.description: A & F Harvey Brothers, first Spinning Cotton Mill, established by Scottish brothers Andrew Harvey and Frank Harvey, in the year 1880.

topPlaces.name: Papanasam Dam
topPlaces.description: The Papanasam dam also known as Karaiyar Dam is located 49 kilometres (30 mi) away from Tirunelveli in Tamil Nadu, India. The dam is used to irrigate 86,107 acres (34,846 ha) of paddy fields in Tirunelveli and Tuticorin districts.

topPlaces.name: Papanasam, Tirunelveli
topPlaces.description: Papanasam also spelt as Pavanasam is a famous picnic spot in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It falls under the Ambasamudram Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Manimutharu
topPlaces.description: Manimutharu is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Papanasanathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Papanasanathar Temple in Papanasam, a village in Tirunelveli district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to Hindu god Shiva. It is located 60 km from Tirunelveli.

topPlaces.name: Sivanthipuram
topPlaces.description: Sivanthipuram is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kizha Ambur
topPlaces.description: Kizha Ambur also known as Keela Ambur is an ancient village situated close to the Western Ghats in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India. The ancient name of this village is Snehapuri.

topPlaces.name: Vikramasingapuram
topPlaces.description: Vickramasingapuram or V.K.Puram is a Town in Tirunelveli District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It falls under the Ambasamudram Taluk.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — A & F Harvey Brothers & around

items.note: A & F Harvey Brothers, first Spinning Cotton Mill, established by Scottish brothers Andrew Harvey and Frank Harvey, in the year 1880.

The Papanasam dam also known as Karaiyar Dam is located 49 kilometres (30 mi) away from Tirunelveli in Tamil Nadu, India. The dam is used to irrigate 86,107 acres (34,846 ha) of paddy fields in Tirunelveli and Tuticorin districts.
Papanasam also spelt as Pavanasam is a famous picnic spot in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It falls under the Ambasamudram Taluk.
Manimutharu is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Papanasanathar Temple in Papanasam, a village in Tirunelveli district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to Hindu god Shiva. It is located 60 km from Tirunelveli.
Sivanthipuram is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Kizha Ambur also known as Keela Ambur is an ancient village situated close to the Western Ghats in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India. The ancient name of this village is Snehapuri.
Vickramasingapuram or V.K.Puram is a Town in Tirunelveli District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It falls under the Ambasamudram Taluk.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Agasthiyar Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Agasthiyar Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Agasthiyar Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (55 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (51 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Agasthiyar Falls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Agasthiyar Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Agasthiyar Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Agasthiyar Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Agasthiyar Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are A & F Harvey Brothers, Papanasam Dam, Papanasam, Tirunelveli, Manimutharu, Papanasanathar Temple.
